query:
UPDATE blog_posts SET 
  metaTitle = 'Eating in China with Food Allergies & Sensitivities: What Travelers Need to Know',
  metaDescription = 'MSG, gluten, halal, vegetarian — practical guide for travelers with food sensitivities visiting China, with diet cards in Chinese.'
WHERE slug = 'eating-in-china-with-food-sensitivities';

UPDATE blog_posts SET 
  metaTitle = 'Essential Apps for Traveling in China in 2026: The Complete Stack',
  metaDescription = 'WeChat, Didi, VPN, maps — the exact apps you need before arriving in China, from someone who travels there regularly.'
WHERE slug = 'china-app-stack-essential-apps-traveling';

UPDATE blog_posts SET 
  metaTitle = 'First-Time China Trip Itinerary: Questions We Keep Getting Asked (2026)',
  metaDescription = 'Planning your first trip to China? We answer the most common itinerary questions — how many cities, Golden Triangle, trains vs flights, and more.'
WHERE slug = 'planning-first-china-trip-itinerary-questions';

UPDATE blog_posts SET 
  metaTitle = 'The Home Dining Cheat Sheet: How to Eat Like a Local in China',
  metaDescription = 'Everything you need to know before sitting down at a Chinese family''s table — etiquette, dishes, conversation, and what to expect.'
WHERE slug = 'home-dining-cheat-sheet-steven-to';

UPDATE blog_posts SET 
  metaTitle = 'China''s Home Dining Scene: The Experience Tourists Are Missing',
  metaDescription = 'Beyond restaurants, a quiet revolution in home dining is opening up authentic Chinese food culture to travelers. Here''s what it looks like.'
WHERE slug = 'chinas-overlooked-export-boom-home-dining';
